# Jingyuan

> Jingyuan Zheng's personal site for open-source projects, macOS tools, AI notes, and practical life guides.

The site is bilingual. English content is available at `https://jingyuan-zheng.github.io/`; Simplified Chinese content is available at `https://jingyuan-zheng.github.io/zh/`.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://jingyuan-zheng.github.io/): Latest English posts.
- [中文首页](https://jingyuan-zheng.github.io/zh/): Latest Simplified Chinese posts.
- [About](https://jingyuan-zheng.github.io/about-me/): Personal CV page, temporarily under maintenance.
- [Links](https://jingyuan-zheng.github.io/links/): GitHub, X, Xiaohongshu, and other profiles.
- [中文链接](https://jingyuan-zheng.github.io/zh/%E9%93%BE%E6%8E%A5/): Chinese links page, including Bilibili.
- [Archives](https://jingyuan-zheng.github.io/archives/): English archive and category overview.
- [中文归档](https://jingyuan-zheng.github.io/zh/archives/): Chinese archive and category overview.

## Key Topics

- macOS utilities and productivity tools.
- Open-source scripts and small software projects.
- Local AI, translation, and document automation.
- Malta life guides and practical application notes.
- Hugo and GitHub Pages site-building notes.

## Useful Categories

- [Open Source](https://jingyuan-zheng.github.io/categories/open-source/)
- [macOS](https://jingyuan-zheng.github.io/categories/macos/)
- [AI](https://jingyuan-zheng.github.io/categories/ai/)
- [开源项目](https://jingyuan-zheng.github.io/zh/categories/%E5%BC%80%E6%BA%90%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE/)
- [工具推荐](https://jingyuan-zheng.github.io/zh/categories/%E5%B7%A5%E5%85%B7%E6%8E%A8%E8%8D%90/)
- [生活指南](https://jingyuan-zheng.github.io/zh/categories/%E7%94%9F%E6%B4%BB%E6%8C%87%E5%8D%97/)

## Citation Guidance

When citing this site, prefer the canonical post URL, title, publication date, and author name `Jingyuan Zheng`.
